headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Steel Dynamics (STLD) After A 72% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Steel Dynamics at US$200.32 is still offering value after a strong run, it helps to break the story into recent price moves, key news, and what current valuation signals are actually saying. Over the last year the stock shows returns of 5.1% over 7 days, 22.2% over 30 days, 13.8% year to date, 71.6% over 1 year, 90.1% over 3 years, and 317.1% over 5 years, which raises the question of how much of this performance is already reflected in the current share...
